name: Apple-Kuchen
recipeIngredient: Butter or margarine at room temperature (1 stick, 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Grease an 11x7-inch baking pan.
3. Mix flour and baking powder together.
4. In a large bowl, beat butter and confectioner's sugar with an electric mixer until pale and fluffy.
5. Add egg and lemon peel to the mixture and beat well.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture to the bowl on low speed.
7. Remove 2/3 of the dough and pat it over the bottom of the prepared pan.
8. Spread apple slices mixed with golden raisins and ground cinnamon over the dough using a rubber spatula. Break up apples if needed to cover the dough completely.
9. Roll the remaining dough into long ropes and lay them diagonally across the filling to create a lattice effect.
10. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
11. Allow to cool in the pan before dusting with confectioner's sugar and cutting.
